frothy bootstrap — fetch and install the ESP-IDF SDK under ~/.froth/sdk/

Bootstrap fetches and installs the ESP-IDF SDK that flash, build, and web-bins depend on, placing it under ~/.froth/sdk/esp-idf/ (or under $FROTH_HOME if set). It uses no sudo, never writes outside that tree, and is idempotent: a successful install drops a marker file, and a re-run exits 0 with "already installed." Pass --force to reinstall from scratch.

Examples:
  frothy bootstrap
      install ESP-IDF v5.5 under ~/.froth/sdk/ (skip if already installed)

Flags:
  -force
    	reinstall ESP-IDF from scratch, replacing any existing install
